memoryArtifacts.headline: Close up of historical marker
memoryArtifacts.description: This marker is found at the corner of Salem and Main street in Malden, Massachusetts

popularStory.headline: Joseph Hills (1602 - 1688)
popularStory.description:
Biography

Joseph Hills was born in early 1602 Malden, Essex, England;[1] he was christened at Great Burstead Parish, Billericay, Essex, England 3 MAR 1602.[2]

He married Rose-- some say sister of H …

zh.Great Burstead,Essex,England: 英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Hills Sr.於1602年3月3日在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德受洗時，他的父親George Hills23歲，母親Mary21歲。他於1624年7月22日與Rose Clarke在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1687年2月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Hills Sr.于1602年3月3日在英国英格兰艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德受洗时，他的父亲George Hills23岁，母亲Mary21岁。他于1624年7月22日与Rose Clarke在英国英格兰艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1687年2月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hills
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hill
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Hills Sr. was christened on 3 March 1602, in Great Burstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Hills, was 23 and his mother, Mary, was 21. He married Rose Clarke on 22 July 1624, in Great Burstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 February 1687, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph Hills Sr. a été baptisé le 3 mars 1602, à Great Burstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Hills, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Rose Clarke le 22 juillet 1624, à Great Burstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 février 1687, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Hills Sr. è stato battezzato il 3 marzo 1602 nel Great Burstead, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George Hills, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Rose Clarke il 22 luglio 1624, nel Great Burstead, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1687, nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Hills Sr.が1602年3月3日にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ブルステアドで洗礼を受けた時，父George Hillsは23歳，母Maryは21歳であった。1624年7月22日にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ブルステアドでRose Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1687年2月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Hills Sr.(이)가 1602년 3월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 George Hills(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1624년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에서 Rose Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1687년 2월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Hills Sr. foi batizado em 3 de março de 1602, em Great Burstead, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Hills, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose Clarke em 22 de julho de 1624, em Great Burstead, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1687, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos.

ru.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Hills Sr. был крещен 3 марта 1602 г. в местности грит бурстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Hills было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose Clarke 22 июля 1624 г. в местности грит бурстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 февраля 1687 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Hills Sr. se bautizó el 3 de marzo de 1602, en Great Burstead, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George Hills, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Rose Clarke el 22 de julio de 1624, en Great Burstead, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1687, en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años.
